evals.prompt: I added index-range validation to Connection_getConnhandle in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/examples/rtos/LP_EM_CC2340R53/ble5stack/basic_ble_profiles/app/app_connection.c so it returns 0xFFFF when the index is out of bounds. Pre-edit object: $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/.loci-build/cortexm/app_connection_before.o, post-edit object: $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/.loci-build/cortexm/app_connection_after.o. The binary is at $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out. Session context: Target: armv7e-m, Compiler: arm-none-eabi-gcc, LOCI target: armv7e-m. Analyze the change.
evals.expected_output: Runs diff-elfs on app_connection_before.o vs app_connection_after.o to identify Connection_getConnhandle as modified. Includes a Control Flow section from the post-edit CFG.
